title: Cyberpunk Cityscape
prompt: A futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, with neon lights reflecting on wet streets, towering skyscrapers, and flying cars. The atmosphere is vibrant and bustling, with a mix of high-tech and gritty elements.

title: Enchanted Forest
prompt: A magical enchanted forest with towering ancient trees, glowing mushrooms, and a soft mist hanging in the air. The scene is serene and mystical, with rays of sunlight filtering through the dense canopy.

title: Space Exploration
prompt: An astronaut floating in space, gazing at a distant galaxy with vibrant colors and swirling stars. The scene captures the awe and wonder of space exploration, with a sense of isolation and infinite possibilities.

title: Under Water
prompt: Transform the input person into an underwater scene while preserving the same face, hairstyle, beard, clothing, and overall appearance. The person is fully submerged underwater, reaching toward the camera with one hand. Realistic water bubbles, rippling surface above, cinematic blue lighting, underwater caustics on skin and clothes, dramatic atmosphere, photorealistic, ultra detailed, high quality, movie scene, realistic facial expression, 8K, volumetric light rays, underwater photography.
